meaning: 里加[拉脱维亚共和国首都];里加湾(在拉脱维亚北岸和爱沙尼亚西南岸之间)
examples: The committee held its founding congress in the capital, Riga.
Two men tried to hijack a plane on a flight from Riga to Murmansk.
Autumn tones in the Latvian capital, Riga.
Not everyone had the euro zone on his mind in the Riga municipal vote.
The second convoy, a week later, also went to Riga: a thousand people, 16 survivors.
